description:
Advances: all 9 subjects.
Parent of the per-subject migration fan-out. Each child migrates ONE subject's
spec-scenarios (-> given/when/then arrays) + spec-verification (-> command:/target:)
blocks and flips status draft -> active. Closes when all children close and the
whole corpus validates clean.
Verification (parent): mix spec.validate => errors=0 (warnings allowed),
.spec/state.json written; every subject status: active.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test
title: phase1: migrate .spec corpus to SpecLedEx schema + promote to active
